message:
fix(tests): fix proptest assertion borrows in session_index and add
config --json E2E test

session_index.rs:
- Fix prop_assert_eq! calls to use references (&meta.id, &cwd, etc.)
  instead of moved values, resolving borrow checker errors in proptest
  property-based tests added in prior commit

e2e_cli.rs:
- Add e2e_cli_config_subcommand_json_output test verifying that
  'pi config --json' produces valid JSON with expected top-level
  keys (paths, precedence, configValid)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
